tasks.title: FamBot dashboard: rebuild web UI from scratch on a component-library foundation
tasks.description: Replace the hand-rolled HTML/CSS/JS dashboard at /dashboard with a React + Vite + Tailwind v4 + shadcn SPA. Full feature parity across all 5 views, follow-system dark mode, bottom-tab nav on mobile.

tasks.title: Tighten dashboard polish — Linear-meets-Things across 5 views
tasks.description: Visual design pass on the existing dashboard before the rebuild. Bring typography, spacing rhythm, hierarchy, motion up to a Linear-density / Things-calm bar in both light and dark mode.

tasks.title: Wire reports into the iOS share sheet
tasks.description: When Pip creates a report, also generate a shareable iOS-friendly preview so it shows up cleanly when you share the link.

tasks.title: Audit and tighten the agent-runner sandbox filesystem rules
tasks.description: Walk every container mount and confirm the agent-runner can't read or write outside the per-group data directory. Pip flagged a path resolution edge case last week.

tasks.title: Migrate vault search from substring to fuzzy match
tasks.description: Substring search misses obvious typos and accent variants. Pull in a tiny fuzzy library or roll one inline.

tasks.title: Quarterly meal plan template refresh
tasks.description: Pull the new seasonal recipe set from the family vault and refresh the meal plan template. Spring veg, lighter dinners.
tasks.session_notes: Started but blocked on the new vault folder structure. Resume after task 63 ships.

tasks.title: Pickle's daycare transition checklist
tasks.description: End-to-end checklist for moving Pickle from the toddler room to the preschool room on May 1. Forms, supplies, teacher introduction.
tasks.session_notes: Initial draft delivered. Rachel has notes on the supplies list and wants a separate teacher-introduction draft.

tasks.title: Wire dev task counts into the morning brief
tasks.description: The 7am family brief should include a one-line summary of what's in flight on the dashboard.

tasks.title: Telegram message queue persistence across restarts
tasks.description: Drop Telegram messages were arriving out of order after a nanoclaw restart because the in-memory queue was lost.

tasks.title: Vault graph: render MOC nodes with a dashed outer ring
tasks.description: Visual differentiation for Maps of Content vs regular nodes in the family vault force-directed graph.
